message:
bd-3akdb.4: Property tests for IVM correctness

20 proptest invariants covering DeltaEntry, DeltaBatch, FallbackPolicy,
DagTopology, EpochEvidence, StyleResolutionView, and FilteredListView.
Core invariants verified: incremental == full_recompute for any delta
sequence, empty delta produces no output, insert+delete is a no-op,
duplicate insert deduplication, fallback monotonicity, topo order
completeness and edge ordering, visible subset correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
